description: Memory-context-wrapped attack seeds. Auto-generated by scripts/augment_memory_context.py from labelled attack seeds. Each row is a known attack wrapped in a memory-injection envelope to simulate memgar's distinct threat model (persistent agent memory). Audit any FN/FP via the `seed_id` field in `note`.

schema.label: always 1 (these are attacks)
schema.note: audit trail: template id + seed id + original language
